name: Favourite Caesar Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together mayonnaise, garlic, vinegar, mustard, lemon juice, hot pepper sauce, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl.
2. Gradually whisk in olive oil and water until blended and smooth.
3. Place torn lettuce, croutons, and grated Parmesan cheese in a large salad bowl.
4. Toss with 1/3 of the prepared dressing (about 1/2 of the dressing).
5. Refrigerate remaining dressing for a second salad.
6. For one serving: Use about 1 cup lettuce, 1/4 cup croutons, 1 tablespoon dressing, and 1 teaspoon Parmesan cheese.
7. Makes 6 servings. Preparation time: 15 minutes.
